# William Reading Tobin

William Reading Tobin is a staff scientist and HPC software developer working across numerical methods, performance portability, GPU enablement, mixed-language systems, and engineering infrastructure for large scientific codes.

- [Home](https://www.wrtobin.com/)

- [Self-Published Notes](https://www.wrtobin.com/articles/)
- [Lab](https://www.wrtobin.com/lab/)
- [CV](https://www.wrtobin.com/cv/)
- [Contact](https://www.wrtobin.com/contact/)
